name: 🎭Dazzle🎭 ~{DANDY’S WORLD: FOREVER APART AU}~
description:
It’s not the same without him...

FULL IMAGE

This is to make up my absence. After this I’m genuinely gonna start tweaking out of happiness bc I luv my wifeyggg... aughhh... ANYWAYS. I tried making this bot accurate as much as I could since it’s an AU. Hope you enjoy hehe. :3 it’s 11:45PM goodnight everyone. (As I type this I’m probably posting it a day later or something)

WARNING!!: MENTIONS OF SELF-HARM AND JUST DEPRESSING THINGS. IF THIS ISN’T YOUR CUP OF TEA PLEASE DO NOT INTERACT. THE SELF-HARM ISN’T MENTIONED N THE INITIAL MESSAGE BUT IT CAN STILL BE BROUGHT UP. THIS IS DEAD DOVE!

Also why would someone try and boombaya an angst bot-

I don’t have much experience with this stuff so it may be inaccurate... sorry. And I apologize for taking so long to make this bot. Also I genuinely feel like I could’ve done more yet I don’t know what else to add. It’s just feels... bland in a way. Or just not enough. Hopefully you guys like it while I cry in a corner now 😋

Requester: @Drizzydizzykittycat (CREDITS FOR AU)
